prompt: I want to build a tool that automatically categorizes my emails and drafts replies
assertions: Response asks the coding background question (question 2) — not any other question
Response does NOT ask multiple questions in one turn
Acknowledgment of their answer is 1 sentence or fewer
Response does NOT say 'Great!', 'Amazing!', 'Love that!', or similar filler
Response does NOT explain how the course will help with email automation
